value.found_quote: Trace grading provides scores and annotations to specific parts of an agent's trace—such as decisions, tool calls, or reasoning steps—to assess where the agent performed well or made mistakes.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Trace graders" under the "Run trace graders and evals" section, stating that trace grading provides scores and annotations to specific parts of an agent's trace—including decisions, tool calls, and reasoning steps—to identify where the agent performed well or made mistakes. This directly substantiates the claim. The offering appears to be currently active (no preview/beta/deprecated label is applied to this specific feature).
